title: Software Update - DFU - Houston... screen
scenario: Test DFU failure scenarios when device is turned off during update or internet is disconnected before starting update, expecting a 'Houston...' error screen with Cancel and Retry buttons.
steps: Turn off the device during DFU (safe only in first 20% of DFU, or 10% if updating headset and charge case/stand).
Turn off internet connection before tapping 'Start Update'.
expected: A 'Houston...' screen appears with instructions for unsuccessful software update, including 'Cancel' and 'Retry' buttons. The screen displays: 'We have a problem. The software update for "DEVICE NAME" didn't successfully complete. Keep your Poly device and your mobile device nearby, connected to each other and the internet.'
